heading: View Flex Cluster Backup Snapshots
body:
Atlas UI

Atlas Administration API

Additionally, Atlas displays existing Flex cluster snapshots
in the **All Daily Snapshots** table. From this table, you can
[Restore from a Scheduled or On-Demand Snapshot](restore-from-snapshot) or
[Restore from a Locally-Downloaded Snapshot](restore-from-local-file) your
existing snapshots.

> **Note:** The Atlas CLI does not support Flex cluster backup snapshots.
